overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through a Los Santos neighborhood. The character walks along sidewalks past graffiti-covered commercial buildings, crosses intersections, and follows a pedestrian through residential streets with single-family homes and palm trees.

events.description: vehicles pass by on the street to the left
approaching intersection with large illuminated billboard visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along commercial sidewalk next to blue building covered in graffiti

entered.detail: two-story blue building with graffiti and a circular BEER sign
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals
large white electrical utility box on the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard visible down the street
tall street lamp casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk at night, passing a blue building covered in graffiti and utility boxes. Street lamps cast a warm glow on the concrete path as vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent road. A large illuminated billboard is visible ahead at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to residential area

events.description: crossing the street toward the commercial building with billboard
transitioning from commercial to residential area with single-family homes appearing

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with large illuminated billboard on roof
concrete wall with red and green graffiti tags
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Crossing the intersection toward a brightly lit commercial building with a large billboard. The environment transitions from commercial to residential as single-family homes and palm trees come into view along the sidewalk.

events.description: beginning to follow a pedestrian in a red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
passing a house with brightly lit window and garage door covered in graffiti

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a red jacket along the residential sidewalk, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-story home with white trim and lit porch light
garage door covered in purple and red graffiti
metal chain-link fence running along the property line

segments.scene_description: Following a pedestrian in a red jacket through a quiet residential neighborhood. Walking past single-family homes with chain-link fences and garages, some with graffiti. The street is dimly lit by overhead lamps with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching stop sign at residential intersection
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the residential intersection and continuing down the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in striped shirt walking across the street
pedestrian in white tank top standing near utility pole

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on metal pole at intersection corner
blue recycling bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Approaching a residential intersection marked by a stop sign. Crossing the street alongside other pedestrians, then continuing down the sidewalk past more homes and utility poles. The neighborhood remains quiet with minimal traffic and scattered pedestrians visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime urban environment that transitions from a gritty commercial strip into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by gliding along a concrete sidewalk past a blue building adorned with graffiti and utility boxes, illuminated by the warm glow of overhead street lamps. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up toward a large, brightly lit billboard at a busy intersection where vehicles pass by. The perspective then shifts across the street, moving away from the commercial hub as the landscape transforms into a residential area. Finally, the view settles on a row of single-family homes and towering palm trees lining the sidewalk under the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential neighborhood that transitions from a walk past suburban homes toward a pedestrian-filled intersection. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in a red jacket past single-family houses enclosed by chain-link fences and graffiti-marked garages, with the distant downtown skyline glowing under dim overhead lamps. As the camera moves forward, the residential stretch opens up toward a street corner marked by a stop sign. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the intersection alongside other pedestrians before continuing down the sidewalk past utility poles and further homes. The movement concludes as the camera glides through the still, low-traffic neighborhood under the nighttime sky.
